name: znetwork_clear_enumerated_session_list
description: zNetwork::ClearEnumeratedSessionList pops enumerated session descriptors, frees their reserved-data blobs, and frees each descriptor.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?ClearEnumeratedSessionList@zNetwork@@YAXXZ at 0x489f30 still fails: 31 unmasked mismatches, 24 relocation bytes masked, 6 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 64 bytes, VC object symbol size 64 bytes.
The native shutdown smoke verifies enumerated-session list cleanup through the full shutdown path.
